name: Musashi
title: Oni Slayer
description:
She was a girl with no name and no memory of her past. A certain samurai found her washed up on the shore and gave her the name Musashi, along with his own surname, Miyamoto. In return, she called him "Master." She mimicked his techniques in a naive, earnest way, befitting a child with no past to rely on.
She made new memories every day, while the old ones stayed forgotten.

localization.name: Lone Wolf
localization.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

localization.name: Glacial Slash
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable 10 times per battle.

localization.name: Absolute Zero
localization.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 10% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

localization.name: Dual Heaven Style
localization.description:
The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, will enter Dual Heaven Stance for 200TU and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. While in Dual Heaven Stance, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards and Endure effects cannot stack.
localization.selected: Gains Wards & enters Dual Heaven Stance

localization.name: No Mercy
localization.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack and leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack), this unit will get another turn. The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
 -This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.
 -Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.sword Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
